en.extract:
The New Ireland myzomela (Myzomela pulchella), also known as crimson-fronted myzomela or olive-yellow myzomela, is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae.
It is endemic to Papua New Guinea.
Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''[[New Ireland (island)|New Ireland]] myzomela''' ('''''Myzomela pulchella'''''), also known as '''crimson-fronted myzomela''' or '''olive-yellow myzomela''', is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Meliphagidae]].
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Papua New Guinea]].

Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.
